recommended_next_task.why_next: Inquisitor and Speculum inputs are now merged; Logos can select the next implementation scope without re-parsing scattered review bundles.
recommended_next_task.risk: If Owner rejects fallback policy or replay boundary, next scope can be delayed.
recommended_next_task.owner_value: One compact decision point instead of multiple pending reviewer threads.

alternative_paths.name: Independent replay first
alternative_paths.description: Run separate independent replay before any new implementation task.
alternative_paths.when_to_choose: Choose when strict audit confidence is more important than speed.

alternative_paths.name: Owner fallback-policy lock first
alternative_paths.description: Resolve fallback policy question before selecting any next build task.
cons: Can block momentum if decision is delayed
alternative_paths.when_to_choose: Choose when policy mismatch repeatedly causes review rework.

alternative_paths.name: Small implementation pilot
alternative_paths.description: Start a narrowly scoped implementation pilot while preserving WARN caps.
pros: Generates fresh evidence for next adjudication
alternative_paths.when_to_choose: Choose when Owner prioritizes forward momentum with explicit warnings.

owner_questions.question_simple_ru: Считаем текущий итог достаточным, чтобы Logos выбрал следующий implementation scope?
owner_questions.if_owner_disagrees: Сначала запускаем независимый replay-пакет, потом возвращаемся к выбору scope.

owner_questions.question_simple_ru: Подтверждаем диапазон эффекта +10..+12 как рабочий ориентир?
owner_questions.if_owner_disagrees: Фиксируем консервативный диапазон +8..+10 и повышаем только при новой проверке.

owner_questions.question_simple_ru: Нужно ли блокировать новый build-шаг до отдельного replay?
owner_questions.default_answer: Нет, не блокировать, но держать cap CAP_NO_INDEPENDENT_REPLAY.
owner_questions.if_owner_disagrees: Полный блок build до закрытия replay-cap.
